aws-redshift-s3:position-deletes:v2.notes: Redshift supports reading Iceberg tables with position deletes

aws-redshift-s3:position-deletes:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3

aws-redshift-s3:equality-deletes:v2.notes: Redshift supports reading Iceberg tables with equality deletes

aws-redshift-s3:equality-deletes:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3

aws-redshift-s3:merge-on-read:v2.notes: Redshift supports merge-on-read for Iceberg tables

aws-redshift-s3:merge-on-read:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3

aws-redshift-s3:copy-on-write:v2.notes: Redshift uses copy-on-write for Iceberg table writes

aws-redshift-s3:copy-on-write:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3

aws-redshift-s3:schema-evolution:v2.notes: Redshift supports schema evolution for Iceberg tables including add, drop, and rename columns

aws-redshift-s3:schema-evolution:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3

aws-redshift-s3:column-default-values:v2.notes: Column default values are a V3 feature

aws-redshift-s3:column-default-values:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3

aws-redshift-s3:table-creation:v2.notes: Redshift supports CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE for Iceberg tables in AWS Glue Data Catalog

aws-redshift-s3:table-creation:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3

aws-redshift-s3:hidden-partitioning:v2.notes: Redshift supports hidden partitioning for Iceberg tables

aws-redshift-s3:hidden-partitioning:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3

aws-redshift-s3:partition-evolution:v2.notes: Redshift can read partition-evolved tables but cannot perform partition evolution itself

aws-redshift-s3:partition-evolution:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3

aws-redshift-s3:multi-arg-transforms:v2.notes: Multi-argument transforms are a V3 feature

aws-redshift-s3:multi-arg-transforms:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3

aws-redshift-s3:time-travel:v2.notes: Redshift supports time travel queries on Iceberg tables by timestamp

aws-redshift-s3:time-travel:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3

aws-redshift-s3:table-maintenance:v2.notes: Redshift supports VACUUM for Iceberg tables including compaction and snapshot expiry

aws-redshift-s3:table-maintenance:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3

aws-redshift-s3:branching-tagging:v2.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg branching and tagging

aws-redshift-s3:branching-tagging:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3

aws-redshift-s3:read-support:v2.notes: Full read support for Iceberg V1 and V2 tables via Redshift Spectrum, Redshift Serverless, and provisioned clusters. Supports external schemas and three-part notation with auto-mounted catalogs. Can join Iceberg tables with local Redshift tables. Supports materialized views on Iceberg tables.
caveats: Automatic query rewriting and automatic materialized views on Iceberg tables are not supported
COPY command cannot ingest from Iceberg tables; use INSERT INTO ... SELECT or CTAS
fixed(L) and uuid types not supported
Strings larger than 16384 chars are truncated

aws-redshift-s3:read-support:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3

aws-redshift-s3:write-insert:v2.notes: INSERT INTO supported for Iceberg tables on Redshift

aws-redshift-s3:write-insert:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3

aws-redshift-s3:write-merge-update-delet.notes: MERGE, UPDATE, DELETE supported for Iceberg tables on Redshift
Redshift does not support Iceberg V3

aws-redshift-s3:catalog-integration:v2.notes: Integrated with AWS Glue Data Catalog

aws-redshift-s3:catalog-integration:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3

aws-redshift-s3:hive-metastore:v2.notes: Redshift uses AWS Glue Catalog for Iceberg tables

aws-redshift-s3:hive-metastore:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3

aws-redshift-s3:aws-glue-catalog:v2.notes: Native integration with AWS Glue Data Catalog for Iceberg tables

aws-redshift-s3:aws-glue-catalog:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3

aws-redshift-s3:rest-catalog:v2.notes: Redshift does not support REST Catalog directly

aws-redshift-s3:rest-catalog:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3

aws-redshift-s3:nessie:v2.notes: Redshift does not support Nessie catalog

aws-redshift-s3:nessie:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3

aws-redshift-s3:polaris:v2.notes: Redshift does not support Polaris catalog

aws-redshift-s3:polaris:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3

aws-redshift-s3:unity-catalog:v2.notes: Redshift does not support Unity Catalog

aws-redshift-s3:unity-catalog:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3

aws-redshift-s3:hadoop-catalog:v2.notes: Redshift does not support Hadoop catalog

aws-redshift-s3:hadoop-catalog:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3

aws-redshift-s3:jdbc-catalog:v2.notes: Redshift does not support JDBC catalog

aws-redshift-s3:jdbc-catalog:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3

aws-redshift-s3:variant-type:v2.notes: Variant type is a V3 feature

aws-redshift-s3:variant-type:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3

aws-redshift-s3:shredded-variant:v2.notes: Shredded variant is a V3 feature

aws-redshift-s3:shredded-variant:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3

aws-redshift-s3:geometry-type:v2.notes: Geometry types are a V3 feature

aws-redshift-s3:geometry-type:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3

aws-redshift-s3:nanosecond-timestamps:v2.notes: Nanosecond timestamps are a V3 feature

aws-redshift-s3:nanosecond-timestamps:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3

aws-redshift-s3:lineage:v2.notes: Lineage tracking is a V3 feature

aws-redshift-s3:lineage:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3

aws-redshift-s3:statistics:v2.notes: Redshift reads column statistics from Iceberg manifest files for scan planning and file pruning. Writes column statistics when performing DML operations on Iceberg tables.

aws-redshift-s3:statistics:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3

aws-redshift-s3:bloom-filters:v2.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg Parquet-level bloom filters or Puffin-based bloom filter statistics.

aws-redshift-s3:bloom-filters:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3

aws-redshift-s3:type-promotion:v2.notes: Redshift supports ALTER TABLE for Iceberg schema evolution including type changes. Supports reading tables with promoted types. Limited to the Iceberg spec-defined promotions.
caveats: Type promotion support depends on the Iceberg table being managed via AWS Glue Catalog

aws-redshift-s3:type-promotion:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3

aws-redshift-s3:snowflake-horizon-catalo.notes: Redshift Spectrum may be able to read Snowflake-managed Iceberg V2 tables via AWS Glue Catalog Federation, similar to Athena. This has not been confirmed. Write access is not expected to be supported.
caveats: Unconfirmed — based on Glue Catalog Federation pattern used by Athena
Write operations to external catalogs are not supported by Redshift Spectrum

aws-redshift-s3:snowflake-horizon-catalo.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3 tables. This is a Redshift engine limitation.

aws-redshift-s3:deletion-vectors:v2.notes: Deletion vectors are a V3 feature; not applicable to Iceberg V2

aws-redshift-s3:deletion-vectors:v3.notes: Redshift does not support Iceberg V3, so V3 deletion vectors are unavailable.
